instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，想像20年後的世界會是什麼樣子。
prompt: What will the world be like in 20 years? What changes do you expect in technology, cities, and daily life? Will people live differently? How will schools, transportation, or the environment change? Share your predictions and hopes.
sample_answer: In 20 years, I think the world will be very different. Self-driving cars will take us everywhere, and robots may help us with housework. Schools might use virtual reality to teach history, so students can "visit" ancient Rome. However, I also worry about climate change because summers are getting hotter every year. I have already started recycling more at home. Although technology will make life easier, we must still protect our planet. I hope people will use clean energy and plant more trees.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 寫未來預測時，可以用 will、may、might 表示可能性；用 I think、I hope 表達個人意見；用 however、although 連接不同觀點，讓文章更有層次感。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，描述一次難忘的學校旅行。
prompt: Describe a memorable school trip. Where did you go? Who went with you? What did you see and do? What made it special or unforgettable? How did you feel during and after the trip?
sample_answer: Last year, my class went on a trip to the National Science Museum. We took a bus early in the morning, and everyone was singing songs along the way. At the museum, I saw a real dinosaur skeleton, which was amazing because I have always loved dinosaurs. My friend Amy and I took many photos together. We also joined a science workshop and made a small robot. Although we were tired at the end of the day, I felt very happy. That trip was special because I learned so much while having fun with my friends.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 描述過去事件時，用過去式（went, saw, felt）為主；可以穿插現在完成式（have always loved）表達延續至今的狀況。轉折詞 although 能讓敘述更豐富。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，談談如何保護我們的環境。
prompt: How do we protect the environment? What environmental problems have you noticed? What actions can people take to reduce pollution? Why is it important to act now? What do you and your family do to help?
sample_answer: Protecting the environment is very important because our planet is facing serious problems. Factories produce a lot of air pollution, and plastic waste is hurting ocean animals. I think everyone should recycle more and use fewer plastic bags. My family has already started bringing reusable bottles when we go out. At school, we have planted trees to make the air cleaner. If we do not act now, future generations will suffer. Therefore, even small actions like turning off lights can make a big difference.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 論說環境議題時，用現在式陳述事實，用現在完成式（has started）強調行動已開始，用條件句（If...will...）呼籲行動。therefore 可引出結論。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，描述一位你生命中難忘的人。
prompt: Describe an unforgettable person in your life. Who is this person? What do they look like and what is their personality? What did they do that made them special to you? How have they influenced your life?
sample_answer: My grandmother is the most unforgettable person in my life. She has kind eyes and always smiles when she sees me. When I was little, she told me wonderful stories before bedtime and taught me how to bake cookies. I remember one summer when I was sick, she stayed by my side the whole night. She has taught me to be patient and generous to others. Although she lives far away now, I visit her every holiday. She once said, "Always be kind, no matter what," and I have never forgotten those words.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 描寫人物時可混合不同時態：現在式描述個性外表，過去式描述過去事件，現在完成式（has taught, have never forgotten）表達持續影響。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，想像如果你有一種超能力你會做什麼。
prompt: If you could have a superpower, what would it be? Why would you choose that power? How would you use it in your daily life or to help others? What would be the good and bad sides of having this power?
sample_answer: If I had a superpower, I would choose the ability to fly. I have always dreamed of soaring through the sky like a bird. With this power, I could travel anywhere in the world without waiting for airplanes. More importantly, I would help rescue people during natural disasters such as earthquakes and floods. However, I understand that having such power would also bring responsibility. If people knew my secret, they might treat me differently. In my opinion, the best superpower is one that makes the world a better place.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 寫假設情境時用條件句（If I had..., I would...）表達想像；用 however 帶出反面觀點；用 In my opinion 做結尾表達個人看法。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，討論智慧型手機的優缺點。
prompt: What are the pros and cons of smartphones? How do smartphones help people in daily life? What problems can they cause? Do you think smartphones are more helpful or harmful? Give reasons for your opinion.
sample_answer: Smartphones have changed our lives in many ways. On the positive side, they help us stay connected with family and friends, and we can learn new things through educational apps. However, there are also serious disadvantages. Many young people spend too much time on their phones instead of studying or playing outside. I have noticed that some of my classmates cannot focus in class because they stayed up late using social media. In my opinion, smartphones are useful tools, but we must learn to use them wisely and set time limits.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 討論正反觀點時，用 on the positive side 和 however 做對比；用 In my opinion 引出個人立場；because 帶出因果關係。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，描述你家鄉的一個文化節慶。
prompt: Describe a cultural festival in your hometown. What is the festival called? When does it happen? What do people do, eat, and wear during the festival? Why is this festival meaningful to your community?
sample_answer: My hometown has a wonderful Lantern Festival every February. Thousands of colorful lanterns light up the night sky, and the streets are filled with happy crowds. I have joined this festival with my family since I was three years old. We eat sweet rice balls, watch dragon dances, and write wishes on sky lanterns before releasing them. The loud drums and bright fireworks make the night exciting. This festival is meaningful because it brings families together and keeps our traditions alive. I always look forward to it every year.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 描述文化節慶時，用現在式描述每年常態（has, eat, watch）；用現在完成式（have joined since）表達多年參與經驗。because 解釋節慶的意義。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，描述一次參與慈善或志工活動的經驗。
prompt: Describe a time you helped at a charity event or did volunteer work. What was the event? Who did you help? What did you do? How did you feel before, during, and after helping? What did you learn from this experience?
sample_answer: Last winter, I volunteered at a food drive organized by our community center. At first, I felt nervous because I had never done volunteer work before. My job was to pack food boxes for families in need. Although it was tiring, seeing their grateful smiles made everything worthwhile. One elderly woman held my hand and said, "Thank you," and I almost cried. Since that day, I have joined more volunteer activities. In my opinion, helping others not only changes their lives but also makes us better people.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 寫志工經驗時，用過去式描述事件經過，用過去完成式（had never done）表達在此之前沒有過的經驗，用 since + 現在完成式表達經驗延續至今。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，說說你認為什麼樣的人才是真正的好朋友。
prompt: What makes a good friend? What qualities should a good friend have? Can you share an example of a time a friend helped you or showed true friendship? Why is friendship important in life?
sample_answer: In my opinion, a good friend is someone you can trust and count on. A true friend listens when you are sad and celebrates when you succeed. I remember once I failed a math test and felt terrible. My best friend stayed with me during lunch, explained the problems I got wrong, and cheered me up with funny jokes. Good friends also tell you the truth even when it is hard to hear. I have learned that friendship is not about having fun together but about being there for each other through good times and bad.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 討論友誼時，用現在式描述一般性的友誼特質，再用過去式分享具體經驗（I remember once...），現在完成式（I have learned）表達人生體悟。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，描述你的夢想職業以及原因。
prompt: What is your dream job? Why do you want to do this job? What skills or qualities does this job require? How will this job make a difference in the world? What are you doing now to prepare for it?
sample_answer: My dream job is to become a doctor because I want to help sick people feel better. When I was eight, my grandfather was hospitalized, and I saw how the doctors and nurses cared for him with kindness. That experience touched my heart deeply. Being a doctor requires not only knowledge but also patience and compassion. Although medical school is difficult and takes many years, I am determined to work hard. I have already started reading science books and volunteering at a hospital on weekends. I believe that saving lives is the most meaningful job in the world.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 寫夢想職業時，用現在式描述職業特質，用過去式描述啟發事件（When I was eight...），用 although 表達克服困難的決心，用 I believe 表達個人信念。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，描述一次尷尬但有趣的經驗。
prompt: Describe an embarrassing but funny experience from your life. What happened? Where were you? Who was with you? How did people react? What did you learn from this embarrassing moment?
sample_answer: One of the most embarrassing moments of my life happened at school last year. I was giving a presentation in front of the whole class when suddenly I tripped on a chair and fell down. Everyone burst out laughing, and my face turned bright red. I wanted to disappear, but then I started laughing too because it really was funny. My teacher helped me up and said, "Even the best speakers fall sometimes." Although it was embarrassing at the time, I have learned that mistakes are part of life. Now I can tell this story and make my friends laugh.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 寫幽默故事時，用過去進行式（was giving）搭配 when 突然事件，增加戲劇感；用 although 對比當時和現在的感受；用 I have learned 表達從中學到的體悟。

instruction: 請根據這張圖片，寫一段約70字的英文段落，談談學英文的重要性。
prompt: Why is learning English important? How can English help you in the future? What opportunities does knowing English bring? Share your personal experience or goals related to learning English.
sample_answer: I believe learning English is one of the most important skills in today's world. English connects people from different countries, so when we travel abroad, we can communicate and make new friends. Many of the best books, movies, and websites are in English. If I become fluent in English, I will have more job opportunities in the future. My parents have always encouraged me to practice speaking every day. Although learning English is challenging, I enjoy watching English cartoons and singing English songs. Mastering this language has already opened many doors for me.
checkpoints: 檢核點1：時態豐富且正確（至少兩種時態）
檢核點2：至少5-6句
檢核點3：包含因果關係或個人意見
explanation: 論說重要性時，用 so 引出因果關係，用條件句（If...will...）表達未來展望，用 although 帶出學習挑戰，用現在完成式（has opened）表達已帶來的改變。
